arts.sum: Kenny McLean has received another four-game ban for violent conduct in Norwich City’s 3-0 loss to QPR.

arts.ttl: Arrest update for Portsmouth FC versus Millwall match with 'excessive' police baton use
arts.sum: Police have said no one was arrested at the recent Portsmouth versus Millwall match despite blaming a section of fighting fans for their “excessive force” with batons.
